old_value: {"id":"ananke-w0e","title":"Language support precision and quality improvements","description":"Cross-cutting foundation + per-language precision improvements for all 14 supported languages. old_value: {"id":"ananke-1lb","title":"Comment/string-aware pattern matching (Phase 1A)","description":"Add lightweight lexer state machine to findPatternMatches (src/clew/patterns.zig:2541) that tracks whether current byte position is inside a comment or string literal. Skip pattern matching in non-code contexts. Per-language delimiter config for line comments (// vs #), block comments (/* */ vs \"\"\" \"\"\"), and string delimiters (\", ', `, r\", \"\"\"). ~150 lines.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"rand.arete@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:42:53Z","created_by":"Rand Arete","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:42:53Z"}
